title: enaimon undulata
side_effects: Enaimon undulata can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and interactions with other medications. In severe cases, improper use of Enaimon undulata can lead to headaches, dizziness, and even liver damage. Some individuals may also experience skin irritation, nausea, and vomiting after consuming the plant without proper guidance. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using Enaimon undulata for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
